name_cn:
Genuine leather
Loewe Large Ear Sheepskin Rabbit
In stock Model 1008 with matching wide woven strap in the same color
🤩🤩 Cute overload, limited edition Rabbit for the Year of the Rabbit. The leather is very comfortable to the touch, and the capacity is self-explanatory; daily essentials fit. Exquisite and youthful, truly healing.
Dimensions 18.5-19-9cm
